title: Velvety Chestnut Stir-fry
description: A herbal, velvety Venezuelan dish featuring slow-cooked chestnuts in a rich sauce, perfect for weeknight meals.

ingredients.name: Canned White Corned Mushrooms (or Diced Mushrooms)
Canned Smoked Salmon (optional, for pescatarian option)

instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the finely chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet. Sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Pour in the chicken broth and add the canned diced tomatoes, canned smoked paprika, ground black pepper, and coarse sea salt. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let it cook for about 10-15 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Add the chopped fresh herbs to the skillet. Continue cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
If using canned smoked salmon, add it to the skillet along with roasted chestnuts. Cook until heated through, about 3-5 more minutes.
Remove from heat and serve hot over steamed rice or as a side dish.
